title: lastrea myriosora
intro: Lastrea myriosora, also known as the maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the fronds of Lastrea myriosora are often used in infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
